Package com.blackaby.Backend.Emulation.Graphics

Class GBColor

java.lang.Object
com.blackaby.Backend.Emulation.Graphics.GBColor
public class GBColor extends Object
Represents one DMG palette colour as discrete RGB channels.

  • Constructor Details

    • GBColor

      public GBColor(int red, int green, int blue)
      Creates a colour from separate RGB components.
      Parameters:
      red - red channel from 0 to 255
      green - green channel from 0 to 255
      blue - blue channel from 0 to 255

    • GBColor

      public GBColor(String hex)
      Creates a colour from a `#RRGGBB` string.
      Parameters:
      hex - six-digit RGB colour value

  • Method Details

    • ToColour

      public Color ToColour()
      Returns the colour as an AWT `Color`.
      Returns:
      AWT colour

    • ToRgb

      public int ToRgb()
      Returns the colour packed as `0xAARRGGBB`.
      Returns:
      packed ARGB value

    • ToHex

      public String ToHex()
      Returns the colour as a `#RRGGBB` string.
      Returns:
      hexadecimal colour string
